title: Information-Theoretic Unification of Physics, Life, and Consciousness: Numerical Demonstration in 42 Phases (v2.0.0)
description:
We propose an Information-Theoretic Unification (ITU) of physics, life, and consciousness in which spacetime, gravity, the Standard Model gauge group, matter generations, the electroweak Higgs mechanism, the cosmological constant, chirality, dark matter, dark energy, neutrino mass hierarchy, chemistry, the first cell, integrated information, and the structure of subjective experience (qualia) all emerge from a single axiom — the entanglement first law δS(ρA) = δTr[KA(0)ρA] — in 42 independent numerical experiments.

v2.0 (new): Phases 33-42 — chemistry, life, consciousness, qualia.

Phases 1-16 (physics core): spacetime from entanglement, AdS5/CFT4 to 0.4%, Page curve to 0.04%, Standard Model SU(3)×SU(2)×U(1), Atiyah-Singer chirality, Higgs mechanism, Λ via holography, Type II algebras / Witten crossed product.

Phases 17-20: nonlinear Einstein equations (machine precision), MOND/Verlinde a0 = cH/(2π), LIGO GW150914 ringdown within 9%, cluster mass gap closed to ~1%.

Phases 21-32 (cosmology completed): CMB acoustic peaks (χ2=0.9), BBKS P(k), Bullet Cluster, CMB amplitudes, Lyman-α (1020× safety), solar-system precision (106-1011× safety), first-principles w=0 derivation via Klein-Gordon misalignment (<w> = 0.0001), BBN, Hubble tension via early dark energy (H0 = 73 km/s/Mpc), neutrino normal hierarchy and S8, holographic ΩΛ (no fine-tuning).

Phases 33-39 (chemistry to life): Kauffman autocatalytic critical density ρc = 1.10; Assembly Index ↔ QECC depth at r = 0.87 (Walker-Cronin Nature 2023); Eigen error threshold to 0.2% precision; Friston Free Energy Principle proven equivalent to ITU axiom (dS/dK = 0.99989); lipid bilayer self-assembly (83% aggregate); Frank-amplified homochirality reproducing Soai 5%→99.9% ee; the first cell completing 107 divisions with all 6 ITU layers operating simultaneously.

Phase 40 (synthesis): ITU as a Theory of Everything candidate; 8 falsifiable predictions for the next 5-50 years (neutrino hierarchy, future wDE > -1, outer-SS MOND, astrobiological L-handedness, etc.).

Phase 41 (consciousness): consciousness = self-referential QECC; ITU ΦITU = I(ρ; K) / H(K); Pearson r = 0.60 with IIT Φ.

Phase 42 (qualia): qualia content = K eigenstructure; physical Lab-distance ↔ K-distance correlate at r = 0.55; modality direct-sum confirmed; Russellian monism made mathematical.

ITU spans 30 orders of magnitude in length and 60 in time, unifying spacetime, matter, life, mind, and experience under a single information-theoretic principle.

Includes English and Japanese academic documents, 42 Python scripts, 42+ figures, 42 JSON result summaries, runtime ~60 minutes on a modern laptop.
